name: Duni AB (publ)
summary: Duni AB (publ), together with its subsidiaries, develops, manufactures, and sells concepts and products for the serving and packaging of meals. It operates through Table Top, Meal Service, Consumer, and New Markets segments. The company offers napkins, table covers, candles, meal packaging products, cups and glasses, plates and serving items, cutlery, LED candles, boxes and bowls, table top accessories, Duniform sealing machines and tray materials, Duniform films, ecoecho serving and meal eco-conscious solutions, and fingerfood products, as well as Paper + Design napkins, Duni Amuse-bouche miniature dishes, and Designs for Duni design products. It also provides plastic products; and profile printing, embossing, and tailor-made packaging services. The company offers its products to hotels; restaurants; catering industry; and retail outlets, as well as fast food, caf√É¬©, and take-away outlets. It operates in the Middle East and North Africa; Asia and Oceania; and North, South, and Latin America. The company was founded in 1949 and is headquartered in Malm√É¬∂, Sweden.
